description: Adds typography styles for the category-chart component.
Uses the 'h6', 'subtitle-1' and 'body-2'
category from the typographic scale.
A typographic scale as produced by type-scale.
The categories from the typographic scale used for type styles.

category from the typographic scale.

category from the typographic scale.

Includes all category related styles into the current style block.
The type scale category.
Toggles category checks against ITypeScale.
Set to false when using a custom type scale.
Add the `h1` styles to custom CSS selector.
Transforms a type style map into css font variables.
The custom CSS variable name.
A type style map reference as produced by type-style.
Assign the `h1` styles to custom CSS property using the CSS font shorthand syntax.
Styles all native elements that match the IElementCategories map.
Add type styles to all native elements.
Creates CSS classes with style rules for all categories in the ITypeScale map.
Create CSS classes for all type styles.
Transforms a type style map into a font style rule assigned to a css variable.
The custom CSS variable name.
A type style map reference as produces by type-style.
Optional prefix.
Assign the `h1` styles to custom CSS property using the CSS font shorthand syntax.
Adds typography styles for h1-h6, paragraph and creates custom typography class selectors.
The produced styles are based on the passed typeface and type scale.
The font family to be used across all typographic elements.
Accepts a Sass list (e.g. "Open Sans", Helvetica, sans-serif), a quoted string
(e.g. "'Comic Sans MS', sans-serif" for backward compatibility), or any other
valid CSS value such as var(--my-font), inherit, etc.
A type scale map as produced by the type-scale function.
Using a font-family list
Using a quoted string (backward compatible)
Using a CSS variable reference
Includes all chart related typography styles for a given type-scale and target.
The type-scale to be used when including typography styles.
